required_skills: Executive calendar and priority management for C-suite principals
Strategic research and briefing preparation for high-stakes executive decisions
Stakeholder communication — drafting executive correspondence, meeting notes, and follow-up memos
Cross-functional project coordination and accountability tracking on behalf of the CEO
Confidential information handling and executive-level discretion
Business analysis and rapid synthesis of market, competitive, and operational data
Presentation design and narrative structuring for board, investor, and all-hands communications
Operational execution and logistics management for CEO-led initiatives and external engagements
preferred_skills: Prior experience supporting a C-suite executive, founder, or senior partner in a high-performance environment
Familiarity with investor relations workflows, board meeting preparation, and LP or shareholder communications
Understanding of corporate governance, compliance requirements, and board committee structures
Exposure to people operations — headcount planning, performance review cycles, and leadership team development
Experience managing executive external communications including media, speaking engagements, and thought leadership content
Ability to conduct primary research through expert interviews, advisor conversations, and conference attendance
Proficiency in building executive dashboards that surface CEO-relevant metrics in real time
responsibilities: Manage the CEO's strategic priorities, daily schedule, and decision queue — ensuring time and attention are allocated to the highest-leverage activities each week
Prepare comprehensive briefing documents, research reports, and talking points for all CEO external meetings including investor calls, board sessions, and partnership discussions
Draft and review executive communications on behalf of the CEO — including investor updates, all-hands messages, strategic memos, and key external correspondence
Coordinate cross-functional accountability on CEO-sponsored initiatives, tracking milestones, flagging delays, and driving resolution without requiring CEO involvement
Design and manage the company's executive operating cadence — weekly leadership syncs, monthly reviews, quarterly planning sessions, and board meeting logistics
Conduct rapid strategic research and competitive analysis on high-priority topics, delivering structured briefs to the CEO within tight turnaround windows
Support board meeting preparation including agenda creation, materials compilation, pre-read distribution, and post-meeting action tracking
Build and maintain the CEO's stakeholder relationship map — tracking touchpoints with investors, advisors, key customers, and strategic partners
Manage sensitive internal communications and ensure that critical decisions made in the CEO's office are translated accurately into team-level action
Lead ad hoc special projects assigned by the CEO, operating with significant autonomy and delivering results with minimal supervision
